name: m14-incremental-rebuild-strategy-impact-reporting
title: M14 Incremental Rebuild Strategy and Impact Reporting
description: Follow-up to M13: add chunk-level identity reuse, threshold-based auto rebuild mode, rebuild impact reporting, and dirty-state export.
